Professional help for your home, family, and everyday needs.

Heart & Oaks Professional Services LLC helps with home clean-outs, move-ins, move-outs, organizing, meal prep, errands, appointments, senior support, and personal assistance.

Serving Plymouth, Livonia, Canton & Metro Detroit

Heart & Oaks Professional Services LLC is a trusted, women-owned home and personal assistance company proudly serving Plymouth, Livonia, Canton, Northville, Novi, Westland, Garden City, and surrounding Metro Detroit communities.

We provide professional home cleaning, move-in and move-out cleaning, home organization, senior support services, meal preparation, errands, appointment assistance, downsizing support, estate clean-outs, and personal assistant services. Whether you need help maintaining your home, supporting a loved one, or managing life's daily responsibilities, Heart & Oaks delivers compassionate, dependable, and personalized service you can trust.

Our mission is to help families, seniors, busy professionals, and individuals create clean, organized, safe, and comfortable living spaces while providing reliable support during life's transitions. We take pride in treating every client with kindness, respect, and care.

Cleaning, Clean-Outs & Organization

Move-In Cleaning

  • Deep cleaning before settling in
  • Kitchen and bathroom sanitizing
  • Floors, surfaces, baseboards, and details

Move-Out Cleaning

  • Property preparation for sale or rental
  • Complete cleaning and debris removal
  • Apartment and home turnover services

Home Clean-Outs

  • Downsizing assistance
  • Estate clean-outs
  • Senior transition help
  • Donation organization and junk removal coordination

Organizing

  • Closets
  • Kitchens and pantries
  • Garages, basements, and storage rooms
  • Decluttering and setup

Personal Assistant & Senior Support

Daily Support

  • Appointment scheduling and reminders
  • Phone calls and household management
  • Companion visits and check-ins

Errands

  • Grocery shopping
  • Prescription pick-up
  • Available to take clients to doctor appointments if necessary, provided a special vehicle is not required

Home Help

  • Meal preparation
  • Laundry assistance
  • Light household tasks

Customized Help

  • Flexible scheduling
  • Big and small tasks
  • Personalized support based on your needs
